title: A/B Test Analysis
use_when: Use when evaluating A/B test results, checking statistical significance, validating sample size, reading confidence intervals, or deciding whether to ship, extend, or stop an experiment.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for general product health, qualitative launch feedback, or exploratory analysis without an experiment design and variant result data.
output_artifact: A/B test decision memo with statistical readout and ship, extend, or stop recommendation
framework_fit: Best for completed or in-flight controlled experiments where the product team needs a decision tied to significance, power, effect size, sample quality, and business risk.
failure_modes: Produces A/B test decision memo with statistical readout and ship, extend, or stop recommendation without tying recommendations to the user's Measure stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats A/B Test Analysis as generic Analytics advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from A/B Test Analysis when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $ab-test-analysis to turn this ab-testing context into a decision-ready A/B test decision memo with statistical readout and ship, extend, or stop recommendation.
examples.expected_artifact: A/B test decision memo with statistical readout and ship, extend, or stop recommendation
